title: Need All {}Columns in Emails & Activities App
excerpt:
Every column on my board needs to be available as a {}Column option when I’m drafting an email in the Emails & Activities app, including: 


{Formula} - A lot of my formula columns are useless if I can’t send that info…

posts.author: kirst (Kirst)
posts.cookedHtml:
1. Every column on my board needs to be available as a {}Column option when I’m drafting an email in the Emails & Activities app, including:

    • {Formula} - A lot of my formula columns are useless if I can’t send that info to my client using an email template.

    • {Timeline#Start} - This is available to use when building formulas, but not Emails. I only need to send clients their start date, not the entire timeline. I used the formula to populate just the start date, but it’s not able to placed in the email either.

  2. Some of our boards have a lot of columns, and currently, I have to painfully scroll through the {}Column list, often missing the one I want because the box is so small. This list should be searchable.

Monday Team, please let me know if these are being worked on!
